captions.formal: A static time-lapse captures blurred vehicular traffic flowing along a multi-lane urban street bordered by high-rise buildings and yellow autumn trees.
captions.sarcastic: The static buildings and autumn trees offer a silent, mocking judgment to the endless, frantic swarm of metal boxes speeding mindlessly down the asphalt.
captions.humorous_tech: This intersection is experiencing peak bandwidth saturation. Dozens of data packets are zooming through the multi-lane network pipeline, heavily buffered by yellow autumn foliage.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The city trees are proudly displaying their bright yellow autumn outfits, but the heavily blurred traffic zooming below is completely ignoring this seasonal fashion show to get to work.
